title: rosa jundzillii subsp. trachyphylla
intro: Rosa jundzillii subsp. trachyphylla, also known as the Himalayan rose or mountain rose, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rosa jundzillii subsp. trachyphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory issues, skin problems, and wounds.
